## Why

Describe why this change is needed and what risk or debt it addresses.

## What Changed

## AI Code Quality Checklist

- [ ] I reused existing modules/utilities where possible instead of creating near-duplicates.
- [ ] I removed or refactored obsolete paths instead of keeping parallel logic.
- [ ] New/changed behavior includes tests for success and failure paths.
- [ ] No new `TODO`/`FIXME` was added without a linked issue.
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally.

## Notes for Reviewers

Call out any trade-offs, intentional duplication, or follow-up work.
